arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: ‘CRAZY three-way operation’ to sign striker
arts.sum: Viktor Gyokeres, Victor Osimhen and Mathys Tel are just some of the forwards that Man Utd have tried to sign, but now they are looking at adding Stuttgart hitman El Bilal Toure to their ranks in what FootMercato describes as a “crazy three-way operation”. Manchester United ’s desire to sign a new striker in the transfer window is seeing them explore every possibility before it closes.

arts.ttl: Manchester United ‘about to recruit’ 23-year-old via ‘meticulous operation’ – Can please Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United signed Rasmus Højlund from Atalanta in 2023, a year before bringing in Joshua Zirkzee from Bologna. The duo have struggled to impress and Foot Mercato state Ruben Amorim has prioritised strengthening the Red Devils’ attack. They say Manchester United have identified El Bilal Touré as a candidate for next season. arts.ttl: BREAKING: Marcus Rashford closing in on shock Aston Villa loan switch as he heads for Man Utd exit
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has been pushing to leave Manchester United for much of the January transfer window and the England star is now finally closing in on an exit from Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Man Utd step up transfer talks after Cristiano Ronaldo approved January deal
arts.sum: Casemiro hasn't started a game for Manchester United since December 30, when the team suffered a dismal 2-0 home defeat to Newcastle. He was hooked after 64 minutes in that game, with his future now looking bleak

arts.ttl: Man Utd target Patrick Dorgu makes telling admission as transfer takes next step
arts.sum: Manchester United have been chasing Patrick Dorgu for much of the January transfer window and a move for the Leece wing-back is now edging closer as he speaks out

arts.ttl: Matchday Warm-up: Name every player to have featured for Palace and Man Utd since 2000
arts.sum: Crystal Palace travel to Manchester United on Sunday (14:00 GMT) looking for a repeat of last season's away-day triumph at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Amad and Garnacho surprise Man Utd's Community Captain
arts.sum: "I enjoy working with young people and being able to give those [an] opportunity [for] what we do as a club and a foundation,” said Bradshaw, who is a youth coach and primary school assistant manager for the MU Foundation. The Community Captains get an award to recognise their dedication and for Bradshaw it was extra special as he received his award from Man Utd first-team players Amad and Alejandro Garnacho, who surprised him and his students this week.

arts.ttl: Video: Dorgu bids farewell to Lecce fans ahead of Man Utd move
arts.sum: Patrick Dorgu said his final goodbye to Lecce fans after his side’s 3-1 win at...

arts.ttl: Player heads for England to join Manchester United – Manager confirms trip and move to OT
arts.sum: Manchester United have already reached an agreement with Lecce to sign Patrick Dorgu in the winter market. On Friday, Dorgu was in the squad to face Parma, but didn’t come off the bench. Earlier that day, we covered claims from Italy which stated yesterday’s tie will be his fixture with Lecce. arts.ttl: Oliver Glasner jumps to defend Romain Esse after celebration on Crystal Palace debut in Brentford defeat
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner has jumped to defend Romain Esse after the former Millwall winger received online disapproval from opposition fans due to the fact he celebrated scoring on his Crystal Palace debut despite Brentford being ahead in the game. “I always tell the players to celebrate every single goal — this is why we play football.
